# custom loop cancelled after 1 iteration(s)

## Context

Automatically promoted from proposed knowledge after being observed in 127 sessions.
Flow: loop-custom
## Anti-Pattern

Session 2026-03-02-fdbe61c9 was cancelled during custom validation after 1 iteration(s). Frequent cancellations in this mode may indicate unclear requirements or overly ambitious targets.

## Evidence

- Observed in 127 sessions across flow `loop-custom`
- Promoted: 2026-03-02
- Source rule: `loop-abandoned`

entries.title: Score variance in loop-custom-BUILD
entries.description:
# Score variance in loop-custom-BUILD

## Context

Automatically promoted from proposed knowledge after being observed in 7 sessions.
Flow: loop-custom-BUILD
## Anti-Pattern

Wide score variance: weakest step "loop-validation" (30) vs strongest "loop-setup" (85). Focus improvement on the weak step.

## Evidence

- Observed in 7 sessions across flow `loop-custom-BUILD`
- Promoted: 2026-03-02
- Source rule: `step-score-variance`
